title: React to news simply
subtitle: Say what happened and how you feel.
overview: Say what happened and how you feel.
A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I read a story about a new train line.
我读了一篇关于新火车线路的新闻。
I think it is good because it may save time.
我觉得这很好，因为它可能节省时间。
I read about a new train line.

items.en: I read a story about a new train line.
items.zh: 我读了一篇关于新火车线路的新闻。

items.en: I think it is good because it may save time.
items.zh: 我觉得这很好，因为它可能节省时间。

items.en: I read about a new train line.
This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I read about a new train line.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I think it is good because it may save time.
lines.zh: 我觉得这很好，因为它可能节省时间。

items.en: I read a story about a new train line.
items.zh: 我读了一篇关于新火车线路的新闻。

items.en: I think it is good because it may save time.
items.zh: 我觉得这很好，因为它可能节省时间。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
